channel.title: UBER — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on UBER (Uber) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Howard Marks: EXITED UBER (-100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Howard Marks (Oaktree Capital) exited UBER in Q4 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Howard Marks)

item.title: Bill Ackman: ADDED UBER (+35%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) added UBER in Q4 2025 · 3.1% of portfolio. Heavy add on the autonomous vehicle optionality.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Bill Ackman)

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: ADDED UBER (+27%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) added UBER in Q4 2025 · 0.1% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Joel Greenblatt)

item.title: Polen Capital: TRIMMED UBER (-22%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Polen Capital (Polen Capital Management) trimmed UBER in Q4 2025 · 1.2% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Polen Capital)

item.title: David Tepper: NEW POSITION UBER · Q4 2025
item.description: David Tepper (Appaloosa Management) new position UBER in Q4 2025 · 4.1% of portfolio. New Uber position — AV optionality thesis.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (David Tepper)

item.title: Polen Capital: ADDED UBER (+24572%) · Q3 2025
